committees.name: Events
committees.description: Plans and executes BCOE's signature events, including the Annual Gala, Golf Outing, Summer Social, and membership meetings. Oversees logistics, programming, and partnerships to ensure each event strengthens engagement and fosters meaningful connections across the industry.

committees.name: Membership
committees.description: Focuses on recruitment, retention, and engagement of BCOE members. Develops outreach strategies, reviews applications, and enhances member experience through onboarding, feedback, and networking initiatives that build a supportive, connected community.

committees.name: Finance
committees.description: Oversees BCOE's financial health, budget planning, and fiscal accountability. Works alongside the Treasurer to ensure responsible stewardship of organizational resources, reviews financial reports, and supports long-term financial strategy and sustainability.

committees.name: Marketing
committees.description: Manages BCOE's communications, digital presence, and public relations. Crafts messaging, designs campaigns, and produces content to elevate BCOE's visibility, highlight member success stories, and attract new partners, sponsors, and members.

committees.name: Education
committees.description: Develops workshops, certifications, and professional development programs — including The Blueprint Minority Construction Accelerator — to strengthen members' business and technical capacity. Builds partnerships with educational institutions and industry experts to promote continuous learning and workforce growth.

committees.name: Legislative
committees.description: Advocates for fair and equitable access within the construction industry. Monitors and engages with local, state, and federal policymakers to influence legislation, contracting policies, and workforce programs that expand opportunities for Black-owned firms across Illinois.

committees.name: Scholarship
committees.description: Leads BCOE Foundation's efforts to invest in the next generation of construction professionals through fundraising, scholarship selection, and student recognition. Partners with schools, sponsors, and community leaders to create educational and career pathways for deserving students.

committees.name: Industry Engagement
committees.description: Created by unanimous board vote to return BCOE to its core mission — securing real construction opportunities for Black contractors. Tracks major developments across Illinois including landmark projects, organizes collective contractor participation, builds direct relationships with owners and developers, and advocates loudly for Black contractor inclusion. Cleo Downs chairs the committee; Shon Harris assists. The committee also leads development of a contractor tiering system — matching Tier 1 established firms, Tier 2 growing companies, and Tier 3 emerging contractors to the right projects, training, and advocacy.
